message:
test(bd-1eem): add 17 unit tests for tasks.rs

Cover untested task manager areas: update_progress on nonexistent/terminal
tasks, fail/complete on already-terminal tasks, register_handler replaces
existing, transition_state timestamps for Running/Completed/Failed/Cancelled,
transition_state identity and invalid paths, TaskStatusSnapshot Debug/Clone,
cleanup with failed/cancelled tasks, set_notification_sender replacement,
cancel with custom reason, cancel notification content, and complete sets
progress to 1.0.

Tasks tests: 42 → 59. Server tests: 1152 → 1170.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
